positive: A stylized, minimalist mountain range silhouette against a dramatic gradient sunset sky. The scene features sharp, clean peaks and deep valleys rendered in black ink, contrasted against a vibrant palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, coral pink, and warm gold. The composition is centered and geometrically balanced, suitable for a textile print. Incorporate abstract celestial elements like constellations and flowing wave patterns subtly integrated into the sky background. Line work should be crisp and scalable, designed to pop on natural fibers. High contrast, vector art aesthetic, screen print quality, deep saturation, flat graphic design, symmetry.
